title: Roasted Kabanos Crumble
description: A savory crumble dish featuring the flavors of kabanos sausage, topped with a crunchy roasted vegetable crust. Perfect for a hearty snack or light meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine sliced kabanos sausage and diced roasted onions and bell peppers.
Transfer the sausage mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together crumble mixture, shredded cheddar cheese, and chopped parsley.
Spread the crumble mixture evenly over the sausage mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the sausage is heated through.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
